content:
**Your group is on a 4 day streak!** 🔥 Here are yesterday's results:
👑 6/6: <@289320818901778434>
<@523084324724146193>  did saw the 3.2 pv... omg iam dying
i couldnt help but smile and surprised at the same time
yes!! and the ult animation just powercreeped nautika animation in my opinion maybe personal bias.. hehehe
her animation and kit are interesting tho
i only see animation... but RIP plant limited
yeh i hope she is a bit older
but her kit is really interesting
prob isolde eupho will go with her
brume is more like sub dps
she will go with eupho isolde... but all i need kaala euphoria,,,, dont make her shaman 2.0
u can even do 2 dynamo teams now
any idea when they will reveal her kit? kaala eupho
beryl- i dont have islode, sadge another follow up queen.... but they killed plant limited lol
but who do you remove for rank up team-
maybe marcus will be halo feeder i guess
i am a little bit confused by the story
when people say they are from different era, I assume it means that they survived the storm and was transported back in time
so in chapter 6, why is marcus saying she is BACK in her era. This implies she was from the past...?
there are some places immuned to the storm
meaning they wont get transported to other eras

I get that, it means they would not be transported to the past. 

But marcus is clearly too young to be from the past though hahaha
ah but marcus's arcanum is reading books
I understand her value as a arcanist, what i meant is that I thought she implied that she was from the past, when she said she was "coming back to her era"
yep sometimes it is confusing like that
u will get more info later on
u will get more important info
then u can tie all the clues in the story
about the characteristics of the Storm
i dont know how its called in english
is cheese and something similar to ham
and it is your mom’s empanadas
you know that the ham is the back leg right?
this meat is the front legs
its cooked tho, not really cured
idk if this is ham or nah
but i think it is not
ok yeh it is from pig’s legs too
ok idk the name in english
but idk if red likes it
i swear fuck red if she doesnt like it
i dont even know ham, salami, etc
we dont even have cheese in our diet
and usually normal households dont even buy cheese
i mean i can buy cheese but my mom will be like
“why are u wasting money on this?”
cuz she doesnt know any dishes to make with cheese
we have a lot of dishes
cơm tấm, bún bò huế, hủ tiếu nam vang,…
any kind of dishes that have rice related
put cheese on the rice, boom
i dont even know in english names vro
uuuhhh i dont even know if parmesan is on my local supermarkets’s shelfs
and you can do them in any part of the world
i usually go grocery for my mom
one of the least popular items in supermarkets
some places dont even sell them cuz no one buys them
people eating balls and not cheese smh
even balls are more popular than cheese
ok when you want to stop eating balls and start growing them go buy cheese and make self made pasta
i mean, we do have western restaurants here
like when we are hanging out
unless is like a family restaurant
but we dont have cheese dishes in our family meals
do it for you only then
wdym self made when there is no family use cheese
we eat tomato sauce spaghetti more
you have to send me an actual picture or the recipe bc i doubt is the same meal i eat
i prefer tomato sauce spaghetti more
like, i dont think you are doing the tuco right
i usually buy jar tomato with some fresh tomatoes + minced pork + sausages (optional)
also dont let any italians see this
we cook the spaghetti to fk
<@523084324724146193>  disgrace on you. disgrace on your family. disgrace on your dog
becuz ya know, if rice noodle is not cooked -> raw
we never eat anything al-dente for 4000 years
and that you call this sauce is just a personal insult
thats the best thing i can do
better to throw the tomatos at the ocean than to do that
i dont know if i can trust your taste after what you just said
its just a rice dish with sides
white rice and meat is your favourite dish?
it is not only that brother
some oil leeks and sweet fish sauce
but how that is your favourite dish?
or if u want healthier one
cơm tấm doesnt have a lot of greens ya know
im going to change your mind forever
meat is healthy, pasta and rice too
do u ever try animals’s balls
But I know bull testes are a delicacy
I think they're too rubbery and rancid smell
i have nothing against liver, do you even eat the good parts?
we eat heart, lung, tongue, eyeball, brain, smalll intestine, liver, balls,….
we utilize every parts of an animal
we dont eat if it is poisonous
i just like to talk about exotic foods
we do eat normal meats bro
here my mom does marinade tongue
how tf u dont like it
i would eat the whole dish
I try it grilled and i dont like it
so many good foods from Argentina and u eat like
i have never found any country’s cuisine that i dont like
rice noodle, fried tofu, boild pig cutlets, some other optional sides like blood sausage, innards, seafood cakes,…
u just grab anything on the plate and dip with shrimp paste
so i dont think id like the shrimp paste
its optional, main parts are meat + tofu + rice noodle + shrimp paste
i watch some vlog and erm
sorry for any people from that country
imo German’s cuisine is prob one of the worst ive seen
bread and bread and bread and cheese
urrgh idk if i can survive in Germany
i only eat greens if im at home
Argentina? Sure every food i see so far is good
German, maybe i can survive like 3 days maximum and i die of palate boredom
for grilled things is more than that, but not too complicated
like no cilantro, thyme, star anise, cinnamon,… all the spices?
i mean, the meat is good enough with a bit of salt
you can use chimichurri and romero but thats it
in German, not even a sauce
you put it before you grilled it
at least u marinate the meat
i tried some brazilian food a couple of days ago and i almost puke
i thought brazilian is similar to mexican
mexican is one of the greatest ive eaten
just give me spices and i eat
you have eaten so much spicy that now your tongue is like that
you have no spicy flavour detection in your tongue
herbs and spices like star anise, pepper, curry,…
i can eat spicy but not too spicy
i dont like too spicy cuz my tongue can go numb and i cant taste anything, i dont like that
well yeh they are spicy but i can eat them
btw i eat tomatoes, onions and tortarelas when im at home
get another buddy to food talk
ok ye see, i like flavorful foods
I especially like that black and red coloring 🖤
We have lots of noodles are in Australia
Some of them (a lot) of them are very spicy tho <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
I think we have two or three local wild species, too cold for most I guess
Yeah, lack of trees does that to a snake
Yeah… we have some very pretty one as well
But the boring coloured one are also the colours of choice for the 1st, 2nd  & 3rd most venomous snakes in the world colours choices
When no hiding space for surprise hugs, need to figure out other way to catch food (how venomous snakes kinda became a thing iirc)
Make sense actually It’s how the inland taipan evolves to being the most venomous snakes in the world at any rate
There’s not a lot of cover or trees or much of anything in central Australia (our desert basically)
Alot of jungle snakes just sleep on branches and do a surprise dive when food is under
I remember a guy said that they evolve such venomous bite is to kill their prey (mice and rodents) or whatever else in there instantly
Not necessarily to kill instantly, many venomous animals aren't in a hurry >_<
Just one bite and food is ready in an hour
And then there's that rodent that evolved together with venomous snakes to become completely immune to them 🫠
Rodents can do that? Usually our noodles make sure they all nom nom

embeds.title: Woodrats’ immunity to snake venom | College of Science
embeds.description: Woodrats’ immunity to snake venom April 17, 2025 Above: Rattlesnake. Credit:  Pexels, Uriel Venegas Researchers looking at effects of the desert rodent's toxic diet discover cool temperatures reduce the critter's ability to survive rattlesnake bites. Discovering pharmacologically potent molecules ca

content: Usually u don’t hear of a prey developing partial immunity to their predator
I figured the noodles who choose spicy gonna make sure their prey don’t survive to procreate and build up immunity but this is fascinating
Yeah and when mice get immune the noodles make spicier spicy
And this is how we get super spicy noodles eating tiny mice
